profile.name: Sagun Karki
profile.title: Data Scientist
profile.education: B.S. in Computer Science and Data Science, Minor in Mathematics | University of Nebraska-Lincoln (May 2026)
profile.about: I architect high-throughput data infrastructure, production machine learning pipelines, and agentic orchestration frameworks. My core focus centers on building reliable distributed data systems, optimizing complex model inference, and transforming low-level telemetry logs into programmatic, system-level insights.

experience.stack: GCP (BigQuery) · Dataform · R Shiny · Python · GitHub Actions
bullets: Developed predictive user engagement forecasting models to isolate high-churn listener segments, driving algorithmic insights that structured multi-platform content distribution frameworks.
Engineered an audio playback analytics pipeline via BigQuery sessionization to track user drop-off intervals, accelerating historical interaction processing speeds.
Refactored production R Shiny analytics engines to transition reporting frequencies from monthly to weekly cadences, drastically improving downstream data freshness.
Automated comprehensive data quality validation layers using Dataform and GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows, cutting GCP compute overhead by 30%.

experience.stack: FastAPI · XGBoost · dbt · BigQuery · K-Means · Geospatial Analysis
bullets: Built and deployed an end-to-end XGBoost classification pipeline to isolate fraudulent subscription signatures, routing real-time inference logic through a containerized FastAPI service.
Executed unsupervised K-Means clustering and geospatial partition analysis on 1M+ raw network node telemetry logs, reducing investigative cycles for security teams by 50%.
Architected dbt data lineage and automated governance pipelines across multi-state infrastructure networks to establish audit-ready data trails.

experience.stack: Python · PyTorch · BigQuery · Deep Learning (LSTM) · ETL Pipelines
bullets: Built automated Python ingestion scripts to extract, transform, and load 40+ years of fragmented, multi-format climate and environmental records into a centralized BigQuery warehouse.
Trained multivariate Deep Learning LSTM architectures to model and forecast localized agricultural yield fluctuations, benchmarking performance variations against ground-truth USDA data sets.
Co-authored research modeling the U.S. economy as a network, analyzing structural relationships across economic and environmental metrics using graph-theoretic methods.
Contributed to pedestrian crash risk analysis integrating Open Street View imagery and traffic-calibrated location data across Lincoln, NE infrastructure.

projects.title: Multimodal Resume Compiler
projects.technologies: Python, Flask, XeLaTeX, Gemini API, Multi-Agent Systems
projects.description: Built an autonomous, auto-correcting multi-agent orchestration system that iteratively tailors and compiles ATS-friendly LaTeX resumes against targeted job descriptions.

projects.title: AI-Powered FAQ System
projects.description: Led a team to build an AI assistant using a RAG pipeline with FAISS vector search for accurate, citation-backed answers.

projects.title: Depression Detection
projects.description: Optimized an XGBoost classifier via hyperparameter tuning to achieve 94.5% accuracy in classifying signals from a Kaggle dataset.

projects.title: Transit System Analysis
projects.description: Engineered a data pipeline to process 30k+ images, correlating crash-risk signals with public transit data to map high-risk zones.

publications.title: The US Economy as a Network
publications.description: Comparison Across Economic and Environmental Metrics. Available at SSRN.

publications.title: A dynamic approach for corn yield prediction to ensure agricultural resilience in the U.S. Midwest
publications.authors: A Mitra, S Karki, Et Al.
publications.description: Neural network–based corn yield forecasting with adaptive integration of weather and historical yield data.

publications.title: Better Safety Analyses through Smarter Data
publications.authors: M Elayan, S Karki, J Hawkins
publications.description: Adding Open-Street-View and Traffic-Calibrated LBS Data to Pedestrian Crash Analysis in Lincoln, NE.
